title: Terms and conditions | NICE
text:
Terms and conditions | NICE Skip to content Accessibility help Search NICE… Skip to content Menu Sign in Guidance Standards and indicators Clinical Knowledge Summaries (CKS) British National Formulary (BNF) BNF for Children (BNFC) Life sciences More from NICE Home Terms and conditions The NICE websites ("the websites") and all information contained in them are available for use subject to the following terms and conditions. By accessing the websites, you agree to these terms and conditions of use.
Background 1. The websites are owned and operated by the National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (“ NICE ”) a non-departmental public body established under primary legislation and based at 2nd Floor, 2 Redman Place, London E20 1JQ, and 3rd floor, 3 Piccadilly Place, Manchester, M1 3BN (" NICE ", " us ", " our " or " we ").
2. These terms and conditions apply to the use of any of the websites in the nice.org.uk domain, with the exception of the NICE Docs website. Where indicated, additional terms and conditions apply to specific websites only.
3. The NICE website provides information about NICE's work, including its recommendations on the use of health technologies in the NHS, clinical guidelines on the management and treatment of particular conditions and its ongoing development of such recommendations and guidelines and other information.
